name: 6 in recessed LED (first light incl. switch leg)
description: Install the first 6 in canless recessed LED light including the switch leg and wall switch.
labor_notes: First light carries layout, the switch leg fish, and circuit tie-in; subsequent lights on the run are much faster.

name: 6 in recessed LED (each additional)
description: Each additional 6 in canless recessed LED on the same switch leg.
labor_notes: Hole saw, jumper to the previous light, connect and set — 45 minutes each in an accessible ceiling.

name: 4 in recessed LED (first light incl. switch leg)
description: Install the first 4 in canless recessed LED light including the switch leg and wall switch.
labor_notes: Same first-light setup cost as the 6 in version; the smaller aperture doesn't change the electrical work.

name: 4 in recessed LED (each additional)
description: Each additional 4 in canless recessed LED on the same switch leg.
labor_notes: Marginal per-light time matches the 6 in version.

name: 6 in recessed LED per light (good/better/best)
description: Per-light recessed LED pricing with selectable trim tiers: standard selectable-CCT, adjustable gimbal, or smart RGBW with app/voice control.
labor_notes: Install labor is nearly identical across tiers; smart lights add a few minutes of pairing each, reflected in the best tier.

option_tiers.label: Smart RGBW LED w/ app control

name: Recessed conversion from existing ceiling box
description: Convert an existing ceiling fixture box to a recessed LED using a canless retrofit connection.
labor_notes: Uses the existing switched box, so no new wiring — enlarging the opening cleanly is the main task.

name: Ceiling fan install (existing fan-rated box)
description: Install a ceiling fan with light kit on an existing fan-rated box and existing switching.
labor_notes: Assembly and balanced hanging take most of the time when the box and switching already exist; includes wobble check.

name: Ceiling fan install (new fan-rated brace box)
description: Install a ceiling fan where the existing box is not fan-rated, using an old-work brace box between joists.
labor_notes: Removing the old box and setting a brace bar through the ceiling opening doubles the job versus a fan-ready location.

name: Ceiling fan install with new switched wiring
description: Install a ceiling fan including a new fan-rated box and new 3-conductor switch wiring for separate fan/light control.
labor_notes: Adds a 14/3 fish from the switch location to the brace-box install; finished-ceiling routing is the wildcard.

name: Ceiling fixture replacement (customer-supplied)
description: Remove an existing ceiling fixture and install a customer-supplied replacement on the existing box.
labor_notes: Standard swap on an existing box; heavy or high fixtures move to the chandelier assemblies.

name: LED flush-mount fixture install
description: Install a supplied LED flush-mount ceiling fixture on an existing box.
labor_notes: Quick swap including our supplied fixture; integrated-LED units skip lamping time.

name: Exterior wall fixture install
description: Install an exterior wall lantern on an existing exterior box, sealed to the wall surface.
labor_notes: Weather sealing and mounting-block fit on siding or stucco add time over an interior swap.

name: Exterior motion flood install
description: Install a motion-sensor LED flood light at an eave or gable location, including aiming and sensitivity setup.
labor_notes: Ladder height and sensor adjustment walk-testing set the time; second-story eaves should carry the two-story modifier.

name: Chandelier install (standard ceiling)
description: Install a customer-supplied chandelier on a ceiling up to 10 ft, including a fan-rated support box for the weight.
labor_notes: Assembly, chain/wire dressing, and a rated box swap for weight support; two hours for a typical dining fixture.

name: Chandelier install (high ceiling)
description: Install a customer-supplied chandelier on a ceiling over 10 ft (foyer/great room), including staging and rated support box.
labor_notes: Tall-ladder or scaffold staging plus a second set of hands to lift and steady the fixture; slow, careful work by design.

name: Pendant install (first)
description: Install a pendant fixture, typically over an island or counter, on existing switched wiring.
labor_notes: Includes cord/stem length adjustment and level alignment — the visible details that take the extra minutes.

name: Pendant install (each additional)
description: Each additional pendant hung and aligned during the same visit.
labor_notes: Marginal time per pendant once staged, mostly spent matching hang heights exactly.

name: Under-cabinet LED lighting (per ft)
description: Install linkable hardwired under-cabinet LED lighting, priced per linear foot including wiring between sections.
labor_notes: Per-foot rate covers mounting, linking, and concealed feed wiring; the switch leg (if new) should be added as a separate line.

name: Vanity light replacement
description: Replace a bathroom vanity fixture with a supplied 3-lamp LED bar, centered over the mirror.
labor_notes: Common swap; off-center existing boxes that need a re-strap add time and should be noted on site.

name: Track lighting install (4 ft kit)
description: Install a 4 ft LED track kit with three heads on an existing ceiling box, aimed to the customer's preference.
labor_notes: Track leveling and head aiming after the electrical connection take the time beyond a plain fixture swap.

name: Bath fan replacement (existing duct)
description: Replace a bathroom exhaust fan using the existing duct and switching.
labor_notes: Housing swap from below with duct reconnection; matching the old housing footprint avoids ceiling patching.

name: Bath fan new install with duct run
description: Install a bath fan where none exists, including ceiling cut-in, new duct run to a roof or wall cap, wiring, and timer switch.
labor_notes: New duct to the exterior is the big cost: attic routing, cap installation, and sealing. Helper handles attic-side duct work.

name: Bath fan/light combo replacement
description: Replace an existing bath fan with a fan/light combination unit using existing duct and wiring.
labor_notes: Combo units often need a second switched conductor check; slightly longer than a plain fan swap.

name: Occupancy sensor switch install
description: Replace a standard switch with an occupancy/vacancy sensor switch, configured to the customer's preference.
labor_notes: Swap plus sensor mode/timeout configuration and a walk-test of the coverage area.

name: LED shop light install (garage/workshop)
description: Install a linkable 4 ft LED shop light on an existing ceiling box or receptacle-fed location.
labor_notes: Chain-hung or surface-mounted on existing power; linking additional units is quick and can repeat this line.
